name: Scaffolding gave way in Sandy, partially my fault for rushing—can I get anything?

mainEntity.name: Scaffolding gave way in Sandy, partially my fault for rushing—can I get anything?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes in Utah if under 50% fault; damages reduced proportionally.** Modified comparative[1]. **Key factors:** 1. Prove others' negligence primary. 2. Evidence fights total bar. 3. Insurer blames you. 4. Jury decides %. Lawyer argues your share low.
